commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: The remaining action is contributor-supplied live dispatch proof and maintainer review, not a safe automated repair lane.; Cleared: The diff changes workflow expressions and TypeScript payload construction but adds no dependencies, new third-party actions, broader permissions, or new secret handling. (sha=2b51b4423b76705ba639cb209e36adb88e734ac3)
commands.review_summary:
This PR extracts assist dispatch payload construction into a core helper, nests assist-specific repository_dispatch options under client_payload.assist, updates assist.yml to read nested values with flat fallbacks, and adds regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main sends 12 flat client_payload keys for assist dispatch, and the related issue identifies GitHub repository_dispatch payload validation as the failure before assist.yml starts. I did not run a live failing dispatch.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor-supplied live dispatch proof and maintainer review, not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: fix: nest assist dispatch options
target.body:
## Summary

- nest assist-specific repository_dispatch options under client_payload.assist
- keep assist.yml compatible with nested-first and flat-field fallback reads
- add regression coverage for visualize dispatch payload size and mode/lens routing

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/202

## Validation

- ./node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.repair.json
- node --test test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts
- ./node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json
- ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check .github/workflows/assist.yml src/repair/comment-router-core.ts src/repair/comment-router.ts test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts
- GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0=commit.gpgsign GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0=false npm_config_cache=/private/tmp/clawsweeper-npm-cache npx pnpm@10.33.2 run check

## Live Proof

- Workflow run: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/actions/runs/26550866999
- Ref: codex/review-issue-202 at 2b51b4423b76705ba639cb209e36adb88e734ac3
- Trigger: workflow_dispatch for assist.yml with mode=visual and lens=state
- Log proof from the Answer maintainer question step:
  - MODE: visual
  - LENS: state
  - {"posted":true,"mode":"visual","item":202,"lens":"state","model":"gpt-5.5","reasoningEffort":"low"}
target.author: takhoffman
